hooks.command: cat ./soul.md && echo '---DISPATCH-CONTEXT---' && echo 'MCP tools are deferred. Before using Notion/Gmail/Calendar tools, load them via ToolSearch first.' && echo 'Notion date format: date:FieldName:start not flat string. Checkbox: __YES__/__NO__ not true/false.' && echo 'Gmail drafts: use gmail_create_draft MCP, not Chrome.' && echo 'Calendar: use timeMin/timeMax in ISO 8601.' && echo 'Check vault/projects/error-log.md for past MCP fixes before retrying.' && NEW_FILES=$(find ./inbox -type f ! -name '.gitkeep' ! -name '_ingested.md' ! -name '.DS_Store' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && if [ "$NEW_FILES" != "0" ] && [ -n "$NEW_FILES" ]; then echo "---INBOX-NOTICE---" && echo "You have $NEW_FILES file(s) in inbox/ that may need ingesting. If new, suggest running /ingest."; fi
